title: Malaxis brachyodonta
taxonomy: Malaxis brachyodonta is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This genus, Malaxis, is a group of terrestrial orchids commonly known as 'bald hypoxis' or 'narrow-leaved orchids'. Malaxis brachyodonta is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Malaxis brachyodonta is further divided into its binomial nomenclature, Malaxis brachyodonta, indicating its species-level classification. This species is part of the larger taxonomic classification of flowering plants, Kingdom Plantae.
